_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Bot VTuber Server
author: supantaignacio@gmail.com
description: Servidor backend del Bot VTuber con express y discord.js.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "==> Instalando dependencias base"
apt update --quiet
apt install -y --no-install-recommends git curl

echo "==> Iniciando instalación del servidor VTuber"
cd /mnt/server

echo "==> Limpiando restos anteriores"
rm -rf /mnt/server/.temp_repo

echo "==> Clonando repositorio"
git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/Ignasaurius/CucuVtuber.git /mnt/server/.temp_repo

echo "==> Verificando carpeta Server"
test -d /mnt/server/.temp_repo/Server

echo "==> Copiando contenido de Server a /mnt/server"
cp -a /mnt/server/.temp_repo/Server/. /mnt/server/

echo "==> Eliminando carpeta temporal"
rm -rf /mnt/server/.temp_repo

echo "==> Verificando package.json"
test -f /mnt/server/package.json

echo "==> Instalando dependencias de Node"
npm install --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund

echo "==> Instalación completada"
ls -la /mnt/server

variables.name: Discord Token
variables.description: Token opcional para iniciar sesión automáticamente al prender el servidor.
